Request: Hi Jim. Fortunately your fridge doesn't seem to be stocked with either carrots or broccoli, so that won't be an issue. I don't know what you have in the way of condiments and the like, but I suggest cutting up the radishes and pickling them, though not too sour (kids do like sweet foods). Using the vegetables and tofu on the pan as well as the pickled radishes, you now have tortille filling. Cut the apple into slices and serve it with the peaches for dessert.
